testcase.name: Captcha endpoints - API › [TC-API-1400] GET /rest/captcha returns a math captcha and answer pair
Captcha endpoints - API › [TC-API-1401] DOCUMENTED VULN: /rest/captcha leaks the correct answer in the response
Captcha endpoints - API › [TC-API-1402] GET /rest/image-captcha returns an SVG payload (authenticated)
Captcha endpoints - API › [TC-API-1403] GET /rest/image-captcha without auth is rejected
Customer complaints - API › [TC-API-1300] POST /api/Complaints creates a complaint
Customer complaints - API › [TC-API-1301] DOCUMENTED VULN: Complaint stored with UserId=null
Customer complaints - API › [TC-API-1302] GET /api/Complaints returns a list
Customer complaints - API › [TC-API-1303] Complaint without auth token is rejected
Customer complaints - API › [TC-API-1304] XSS payload in complaint message is stored as a literal string
Delivery methods - API › [TC-API-1000] GET /api/Deliverys returns the catalog of delivery methods
Delivery methods - API › [TC-API-1001] DOCUMENTED VULN: GET /api/Deliverys is reachable without authentication
Order / Checkout flow - API (missing flow) › [TC-API-1600] POST /rest/basket/{bid}/checkout returns an orderConfirmation id
Order / Checkout flow - API (missing flow) › [TC-API-1601] Order is retrievable via /rest/track-order/{id} after checkout
Order / Checkout flow - API (missing flow) › [TC-API-1602] Basket is emptied after a successful checkout
Order / Checkout flow - API (missing flow) › [TC-API-1603] Multi-item basket places a single order
Order / Checkout flow - API (missing flow) › [TC-API-1610] Checkout without an auth token is rejected
Order / Checkout flow - API (missing flow) › [TC-API-1611] DOCUMENTED VULN: empty-basket checkout still mints an order on default Juice Shop
Order / Checkout flow - API (missing flow) › [TC-API-1612] Checkout with a non-existent addressId fails cleanly
Order / Checkout flow - API (missing flow) › [TC-API-1613] Checkout with a non-existent deliveryMethodId fails cleanly
Order / Checkout flow - API (missing flow) › [TC-API-1620] Tampered JWT cannot place an order
Order / Checkout flow - API (missing flow) › [TC-API-1621] DOCUMENTED VULN: another user can checkout the assignment user's basket (BOLA)
Order / Checkout flow - API (missing flow) › [TC-API-1622] SQL-injection in couponData does not bypass coupon validation
Order / Checkout flow - API (missing flow) › [TC-API-1630] Checkout with the maximum-eta delivery method is accepted
Order / Checkout flow - API (missing flow) › [TC-API-1640] 5 sequential orders all succeed and produce distinct order ids
Order / Checkout flow - API (missing flow) › [TC-API-1641] Single checkout latency under 3000ms
Recycle requests - API › [TC-API-900] POST /api/Recycles creates a recycle request
Recycle requests - API › [TC-API-901] DOCUMENTED VULN: Recycle request is created with UserId=null
Recycle requests - API › [TC-API-902] Recycle request without auth token is rejected
Recycle requests - API › [TC-API-903] DOCUMENTED VULN: Recycle accepts negative quantity
Recycle requests - API › [TC-API-904] DOCUMENTED VULN: GET /api/Recycles/{id} returns ALL recycles, not just the requested id
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-001] POST /api/Cards/ creates a card with unique details
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-002] GET /api/Cards/ returns the newly created card in the list
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-003] DELETE /api/Cards/{id} removes the card from the list
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-004] GET /api/Cards/ list response masks the full card number (last 4 digits visible)
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-005] Add card with maximum allowed expYear (2099)
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-101] Reject card with expYear below allowed minimum
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-102] Reject card with expMonth above maximum
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-103] Reject add-card request without auth token
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-104] Reject card with expMonth below minimum (0)
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-105] Reject card at expYear boundary just below minimum (2079)
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-106] Reject add-card request with invalid bearer token
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-110] DOCUMENTED VULN: Missing cardNum is accepted on default Juice Shop
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-111] DOCUMENTED VULN: Missing expMonth is accepted on default Juice Shop
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-112] DOCUMENTED VULN: Missing expYear is accepted on default Juice Shop
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-113] Reject card with non-numeric expMonth string
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-114] Reject card with negative expMonth
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-120] SQL-injection payload in fullName is stored as a literal string
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-121] XSS payload in fullName is stored verbatim and not interpreted server-side
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-122] Cannot create a card on another userId via mass-assignment
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-123] Tampered JWT signature is rejected
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-124] Oversized fullName payload (10KB) does not crash the server
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-125] Another user cannot read or delete this user's cards (IDOR probe)
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-130] expMonth=1 (lower valid bound) is accepted
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-131] expMonth=12 (upper valid bound) is accepted
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-132] expYear=2080 (lower valid bound) is accepted
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-133] expYear=2100 (just past upper bound) is rejected
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-134] cardNum at 16-digit standard length is accepted
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-140] 10 cards created concurrently all return 201
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-141] 25 cards created sequentially all return 201
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-142] Single add-card P95 latency under 1500ms across 10 sequential calls
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-006] GET /api/Cards/{id} returns the requested card
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-115] DOCUMENTED VULN: POST with an empty body is accepted on default Juice Shop
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-116] POST with malformed JSON body is rejected
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-117] POST with cardNum containing non-digit characters is normalized or rejected
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-118] POST with very short cardNum (4 digits) is rejected
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-119] POST with very long cardNum (32 digits) is rejected
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-126] DELETE a non-existent card id is handled cleanly
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-127] PUT /api/Cards/{id} must not silently mutate a stored card
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-128] POST with extra unknown fields ignores them (no mass-assignment)
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-150] DOCUMENTED VULN: re-posting an identical card is accepted (no idempotency / no de-dup)
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-151] Concurrent identical-card POSTs do not crash the server
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-152] Response shape is JSON-schema-stable (id, fullName, expMonth, expYear, cardNum)
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-153] DOCUMENTED VULN: PATCH on /api/Cards/{id} crashes with 500 instead of returning 405
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-154] POST with text/plain Content-Type is rejected with 4xx
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-155] cardholderName with Unicode (हिंदी, 中文, emoji) is stored verbatim
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-156] Cross-layer: card created via API is visible to a fresh authenticated session
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-160] DOCUMENTED VULN: whitespace-only fullName is accepted as a valid name
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-161] DOCUMENTED VULN: numeric fullName (12345) is coerced to a string and accepted
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-162] DOCUMENTED VULN: string expMonth ("5") is accepted instead of strictly typed int
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-163] expMonth=5.7 (float) is rejected by the isInt validator
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-164] GET /api/Cards/{nonexistent-id} returns 400 "Malicious activity detected" instead of 404
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-165] GOOD: cross-user GET /api/Cards/{id} is blocked by the IDOR-detection middleware
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-166] DOCUMENTED VULN: login email is case-sensitive (UPPER@x.test ≠ upper@x.test)
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-167] DOCUMENTED VULN: login email leading/trailing whitespace is not trimmed
Payment Cards - API (Task 3) › [TC-API-168] DOCUMENTED VULN: array as password crashes the server with 500
Track order - API › [TC-API-1100] GET /rest/track-order/{id} returns a tracking record
Track order - API › [TC-API-1101] GET /rest/track-order/{nonexistent} still returns 200 with empty data
Track order - API › [TC-API-1102] Track-order id with traversal characters does not crash the server
Two-factor authentication - API › [TC-API-1200] GET /rest/2fa/status returns setup state for the user
Two-factor authentication - API › [TC-API-1201] POST /rest/2fa/setup with a tampered initialToken is rejected
Two-factor authentication - API › [TC-API-1202] GET /rest/2fa/status without a token is rejected
Wallet - API › [TC-API-700] GET /rest/wallet/balance returns the user balance
Wallet - API › [TC-API-701] GET /rest/wallet/balance without auth is rejected
Wallet - API › [TC-API-702] GET /rest/wallet/balance with tampered JWT is rejected
User identity & lookup - API › [TC-API-1500] GET /rest/user/whoami returns the current user when authenticated via cookie
User identity & lookup - API › [TC-API-1501] GET /rest/user/whoami without a token returns an empty user
User identity & lookup - API › [TC-API-1502] GET /rest/user/security-question returns the question for a known email
User identity & lookup - API › [TC-API-1503] DOCUMENTED VULN: security-question endpoint is an enumeration oracle
Account-area pages reachability - UI › [TC-UI-1500] Wallet page renders the current balance
Account-area pages reachability - UI › [TC-UI-1501] Last login IP page is reachable
Account-area pages reachability - UI › [TC-UI-1502] Privacy & Security menu route loads without redirect
Account-area pages reachability - UI › [TC-UI-1503] Two-factor authentication setup page is reachable
Account-area pages reachability - UI › [TC-UI-1504] Data-export page is reachable
Account-area pages reachability - UI › [TC-UI-1505] Complain page is reachable for logged-in users
Public information pages reachability - UI › [TC-UI-1600] Privacy policy page is reachable without login
Public information pages reachability - UI › [TC-UI-1601] Photo wall page is reachable without login
Public information pages reachability - UI › [TC-UI-1602] Track-result lookup page is reachable
Public information pages reachability - UI › [TC-UI-1603] 403 error page renders the error layout
Order / Checkout flow - UI (missing flow) › [TC-UI-700] End-to-end order: basket → address → delivery → payment → place order
Order / Checkout flow - UI (missing flow) › [TC-UI-701] Order confirmation surfaces a non-empty order id
Order / Checkout flow - UI (missing flow) › [TC-UI-702] Placed order shows up in the user's order history
Order / Checkout flow - UI (missing flow) › [TC-UI-710] Checkout button is unreachable when the basket is empty
Order / Checkout flow - UI (missing flow) › [TC-UI-711] DOCUMENTED UX: address selection is reset when navigating back from delivery
Order / Checkout flow - UI (missing flow) › [TC-UI-720] DOCUMENTED VULN: /address/select is reachable without auth on default Juice Shop
Order / Checkout flow - UI (missing flow) › [TC-UI-721] Direct navigation to /order-completion/<random> does not reveal another user's order
Order / Checkout flow - UI (missing flow) › [TC-UI-730] Place an order with a high-quantity basket (3 of one item)
Login - UI (Task 1: beforeEach login) › authenticated session › [TC-UI-100] beforeEach login lands on a logged-in homepage
Login - UI (Task 1: beforeEach login) › authenticated session › [TC-UI-101] Logged-in user can open the account menu and see the email
Login - UI (Task 1: beforeEach login) › authenticated session › [TC-UI-102] /rest/user/whoami responds with the authenticated user after beforeEach login
Login - UI (Task 1: beforeEach login) › authenticated session › [TC-UI-103] Logout returns to a logged-out state
Login - UI (Task 1: beforeEach login) › login form validation › [TC-UI-110] Login button is disabled while either field is empty
Login - UI (Task 1: beforeEach login) › login form validation › [TC-UI-111] Login fails with a wrong password
Login - UI (Task 1: beforeEach login) › login form validation › [TC-UI-112] Login fails for an unregistered email
Login - UI (Task 1: beforeEach login) › login form validation › [TC-UI-113] Whitespace-only credentials are rejected
Login - UI (Task 1: beforeEach login) › login form validation › [TC-UI-114] Password case mismatch is rejected
Login - UI (Task 1: beforeEach login) › login form validation › [TC-UI-120] DOCUMENTED VULN: SQL-injection email comment bypass logs in on default Juice Shop
Login - UI (Task 1: beforeEach login) › login form validation › [TC-UI-121] XSS payload in email field is not executed
Login - UI (Task 1: beforeEach login) › login form validation › [TC-UI-122] Error message does not disclose whether the email exists
Login - UI (Task 1: beforeEach login) › login form validation › [TC-UI-130] Very long email input is handled without crashing
Login - UI (Task 1: beforeEach login) › login form validation › [TC-UI-131] Very long password input is handled without crashing
Login - UI (Task 1: beforeEach login) › login form validation › [TC-UI-140] Load: 5 sequential failed logins in <10s do not lock or 5xx
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-001] User can add card details from My Payment Options
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-002] Submit button is disabled when the add-card form is empty
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-003] Adding multiple cards in sequence lists each one
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-004] My Payment Options menu item navigates to /saved-payment-methods
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-010] Submit stays disabled when only the name is filled
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-011] Submit stays disabled when card number is missing
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-012] Non-digit keystrokes are filtered by the Card Number field
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-013] Submit stays disabled when only month is selected
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-020] XSS payload in cardholder name is rendered as text, not script
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-021] SQL-injection style cardholder name is treated as a literal string
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-022] Card list masks the card number (only last 4 digits visible)
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-030] Card with minimum allowed expiry year (2080) is accepted
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-031] Card with maximum offered expiry year (2099) is accepted
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-032] Cardholder name at long boundary (200 chars) is accepted
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-040] Adding 5 cards in rapid succession all succeed and are listed
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-041] Add-card round-trip from menu click to confirmation completes under 15s
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-005] Saved card persists across a full page reload
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-006] Saved card row exposes the cardholder name and the last 4 digits
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-014] Submit stays disabled when only the year is selected
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-015] Empty-string cardholder name is not enough to enable Submit
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-016] DOCUMENTED UX: whitespace-only cardholder name passes form validation
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-017] Submit is briefly disabled during in-flight save (no double-submit)
My Payment Options - UI (Task 2) › [TC-UI-033] Unicode characters in cardholder name are accepted and rendered
